title.name: Beary's Breakfast Bar
title.description: Beary's has the best porridge! The atmosphere and customer service make you feel like you are sitting in the middle of the woods, eating like a bear!

beverages.name: Honey Tea
beverages.description: A warm, sweet tea made with the highest quality honey and a bit of lemon to start your day off right!

beverages.name: Beary Tea
beverages.description: A comforting, almost filling, tea that is infused with the flavors of several kinds of berries. Best served cold, but can be served hot on request.

sides.name: Toast and Jam
sides.description: A slice of toast, your choice of bread, and our homemade blackberry or raspberry jam.

sides.name: Fresh Fruit
sides.description: A small bowl of fresh fruit, whatever we find at the market for the day.

mainDishes.name: Pancakes
mainDishes.description: A stack of homemade buttermilk pancakes, served with our locally sourced maple syrup.

mainDishes.name: French Toast
mainDishes.description: Two slices of the best french toast you will ever eat, served with our locally sourced maple syrup.

mainDishes.name: Beary Veggie Sandwich
mainDishes.description: Do you like vegetables? Then this is the sandwich for you! Stuffed full of a variety of fresh produce, it will fill you up.

mainDishes.name: BLT
mainDishes.description: Interested in the Beary Veggie Sandwich but also love bacon? Say no more.

mainDishes.name: Bagel and Lox
mainDishes.description: Our house specialty, you can't go wrong with a hearty bagel topped with sustainably harvested salmon.

mainDishes.name: Honeycomb
mainDishes.description: Are you a bear like us? Then you will love our honeycomb. And, yes humans, it is just a piece of honeycomb, not the popular breakfast cereal.

mainDishes.name: Beary Bowl
mainDishes.description: Get a big ole bowl of our berries! Side of honey is $1 extra.

mainDishes.name: The Beary Best Porridge
mainDishes.description: Made by Baby Bear himself, this porridge is guaranteed to be just right, or your money back.
